{{Quote|I was hoping you would stop by, soldier. We have some new orders for you. We've placed sensor arrays in Restuss to help us in our search for research material left after the explosion. The Rebel scum had the nerve to capture some of these to use for themselves. This can't stand; we need you to recapture them!|Captain Exov to an Imperial|<ref name="SWG:SK">{{GalaxiesNGE}}</ref>}}
'''Exov''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He directed [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] in disrupting [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] supply lines, and capturing stolen sensor arrays during the [[Battle of Restuss]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]].

==Behind the scenes==
Exov was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
